svg.title: Daily time use by gender in India (minutes)
svg.desc: Daily time use by gender in India (minutes). Source: NSSO Time Use Survey 2024. Among persons aged 6 years and above performing each activity. Leisure/mass media is an average across participants and does not capture how fragmented or uninterrupted the time is.

g.text: Daily time use by gender in India (minutes)

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: NSSO Time Use Survey 2024 — Among persons aged 6 years and above performing each activity. Leisure/mass media is an average across participants and does not capture how fragmented or uninterrupted the time is.
